item.title: Download Ref-n-Write 7.1
item.description: Ref-n-Write is a Microsoft Word Add-in that helps you improve your English writing skills. Writers can look up previous documents in real time while writing to gather ideas about content and language style. This tool promotes the principle of imitative learning in which writers learn from their peers by imitating their style and vocabulary. Ref-n-Write is a very popular research tool used by PhD students, PostDocs and Academics worldwide to write research articles and dissertations. You...

item.title: Download JSoft PDF Reducer 8.3
item.description: JSoft PDF Reducer is a software application designed to compress and reduce the size of PDF files. The program provides many features and tools to optimize PDF files, such as removing unused objects, compressing images, and removing bookmarks and annotations. You are also allowed to rearrange, delete pages, add or remove text, and secure your PDF files with Watermarks, passwords and digital signatures. It's set up in a wizard format, so you'll be guided through the steps. Features of...

item.title: Download FastFlix 6.2.1
item.description: FastFlix is a simple and user-friendly GUI for video encoding. The application has a user-friendly GUI that includes all the necessary tools and configuration options for video encoding. FastFlix provides support for a variety of formats, including MP4, MKV, MOV, M4V, AVI, DIVX, WebM, MPG, MP2, MPEG, OGG, MOV, M4P, FLV, and more. HEVC and YUV videos are also among the compatible formats. You can choose the output format through a simple drop-down menu in the main window. FastFlix can...

item.title: Download Devious Machines Duck 2.0.26
item.description: Devious Machines Duck is a dynamic processor plugin designed to control the volume of a track or a specific audio signal in a mix. It is often used for "ducking" effects, where one sound source automatically lowers the volume when another source is present. Ducking is often used in music production and audio post-production to create space in a mix, emphasize certain elements, or prevent frequencies from clashing. Duck has a sidechain input that allows you to trigger volume reduction...

Elevate your virtual tour workflow with Aura Studio Pro, the ultimate offline environment for processing 360-degree media. Designed for professional photographers and real estate professionals, Aura Studio Pro delivers high-quality results without the need for cloud subscriptions or an internet connection.
